message:
feat(tabs): add tab management with native OS dialog picker

- Add Tab struct and tabs list to manage multiple browser tabs internally
- Add tab button in toolbar showing count (pill badge style)
- Click tab button shows native list picker (AppleScript on macOS, zenity on Linux)
- New tabs from window.open/target="_blank" are captured and added to tab list
- Remove broken TUI dialog overlay - let Chrome show native dialogs in screencast
- Add Chrome flags to reduce viewport resize (hide scrollbars, disable extensions, etc)
- Fix data: and javascript: URL handling (don't add https:// prefix)
